--- Menu Page: https://www.hippinhops.com ---
CURRENT MENU | Hippin Hops Brewpub & Oyster Bar
top of page
FOOD MENU
Automatic 20% gratuity on all checks.
SMALL BITES...Big Flavor!
Crawfish Rolls
Two (2) egg rolls filled with plump crawfish, seasoned rice, cheese, and herbs! Served with our signature Remoulade Sauce or Sweet Chili Glaze.
$13
Jerk Rolls
Two (2) egg rolls stuffed with tender chicken, cabbage, and peppers marinated in a mild jerk spice! Served with our signature Jerk Ranch.
$13
"Mac Daddy" Rolls
Two (2) egg rolls stuffed with a creamy mac & cheese full of crab, crawfish, and shrimp! Served with our signature Remoulade Sauce or Sweet Chili Glaze!
$14
Juicy Chicken Bites
Chunks of crispy seasoned chicken served naked or tossed in a flavor of your choice: Bourbon BBQ, Cajun Butter, Hot Cajun, Hot Honey, Jerk BBQ, Lemon Pepper, Sweet Chili
$14
Big Fried Shrimp
Eight (8) crispy fried shrimp served with your choice of dipping sauce!
$15
Catfish Nuggs
Chunky cuts of fried catfish served with our signature Remoulade or Tartar Sauce!
$15
TOPLESS BAKED OYSTERS
Each Tray Has Six (6) Oysters On The Half Shell!
The Butter Garlic
Baked in our signature garlic butter sauce and topped with herbs!
$15
The Sweet Thangs
Drizzled in a sweet & spicy sauce!
$15
PREMIUM BAKED OYSTERS
Each Tray Has Six (6) Oysters On The Half Shell w/ Toppings!
The Pesto Parmesan
Fresh pesto sauce baked into Parmesan cheese!
$17
The Smoked Gouda
Fresh smoked Gouda cheese baked on top!
$17
The Bacon Smokehouse
Smoked hickory bacon with fresh cheddar!
$18
The Collardfeller
Our special recipe collard greens with smoked turkey and baked cheese on top!
$18
The Rockefeller
A classic Rockefeller mix of spinach, cheeses, herbs, and more!
$19
The Baconfella Rock
Our signature Rockefeller mix of spinach, cheeses, and herbs with real bits of bacon!
$19
The Philly Steak & Cheese
Tender steak marinated in onions and peppers, with a fresh baked cheese topper!
$19
The Crawdaddy
Marinated crawfish tails with parmesan cheese and robust garlic!
$22
The Shrimp Boss
A special three-cheese blend with garlic butter shrimp on top!
$24
The Bottom of the Bayou
A Louisiana infusion of shrimp, crawfish, and crabmeat for our crab cake oyster!
$24
The Oyster Overload
Six (6) garlic butter oysters topped with six (6) crispy fried oysters, drizzled with a sweet and tangy sauce!
$27
OYSTER TRAY SAMPLERS
THE ULTIMATE TRIO
Choose three (3) flavors from our Premium Baked Selection and receive two (2) of each!
FLAVOR CHOICES: Butter Garlic, Sweet Spice, Pesto Parmesan, Smoked Gouda, Bacon Smokehouse, Philly Cheese Steak, Collardfeller, Rockefeller, Baconfella Rock, Crawdaddy, Shrimp Boss, Bottom of the Bayou, Oyster Overload
$24
THE ULTIMATE QUAD
Choose four (4) flavors from our Premium Baked Selection and receive two (2) of each!
FLAVOR CHOICES: Butter Garlic, Sweet Spice, Pesto Parmesan, Smoked Gouda, Bacon Smokehouse, Philly Cheese Steak, Collardfeller, Rockefeller, Baconfella Rock, Crawdaddy, Shrimp Boss, Bottom of the Bayou, Oyster Overload
$30
BIG BITES...and YES, They Come With Fries!
Tasty Street Tacos
Three (3) street tacos topped with a fresh coleslaw mix and our signature remoulade sauce. Choose from Catfish or Shrimp! (And sorry, no mixing and matching!)
$18
The Wing Basket
Six (6) specially seasoned party wings served crispy with Cajun fries.
Flavor Choice: Bourbon BBQ, Cajun Butter, Hot Cajun, Hot Honey, Jerk BBQ, Lemon Pepper, Sweet Chili
$19
Catfish Po' Boy
Crispy catfish filets served in a 6-inch French bread roll with lettuce and tomatoes, topped with our signature remoulade sauce. Served with Cajun fries.
$19
Shrimp Po' Boy
Crispy fried shrimp served in a 6-inch French bread roll with lettuce and tomatoes, topped with our signature remoulade sauce.  Served with Cajun fries.
$19
Vegan Sausage Po' Boy
Spicy plant-based sausage served in a 6-inch French bread roll with lettuce, tomatoes, and Sweet & Spicy sauce. Served with Cajun fries.
$19
Vegan
Vegetarian
Chicken & Waffle Sliders
Two (2) fried chicken filets between fluffy homestyle waffles! Syrup served on the side. Fries not included.
$17
Catfish Burger
Crispy catfish filets served with lettuce, tomato, and pepper jack cheese on a toasted bun, topped with our signature remoulade sauce! Served with Cajun fries.
$19
Shrimp Burger
Crispy fried shrimp served with lettuce, tomato, and pepper jack cheese on a brioche bun, topped with our signature remoulade sauce. Served with Cajun fries.
$19
